description: Module::fn_by_id (fz_ir.rs:397) is iter().find() — O(n_fns) per call. It is called from hot paths: compute_effective_returns (inside a loop over all specs×blocks), walk_spec_for_discovery (per block), type_prim (MakeClosure arm, per stmt). Add a fn_idx: HashMap<FnId, usize> field to Module, populated in ir_lower when each FnIr is pushed into module.fns. fn_by_id becomes: self.fns[*self.fn_idx.get(&id).expect("unknown fn id")]. All callers are unaffected; the API surface stays the same.
title: replace O(n) fn_by_id scan with O(1) Module index
